scripts.build: electron-packager . Timeline --platform=darwin --overwrite --icon=icon.icns --asar && node scripts/clean-privacy-keys.js Timeline-darwin-arm64/Timeline.app; rm -rf ../Timeline.app && cp -R Timeline-darwin-arm64/Timeline.app ../Timeline.app && xattr -cr ../Timeline.app && echo 'App updated'
scripts.push: cd .. && git add app/main.js app/preload.js app/package.json app/timeline.html && git commit -m 'Update source' && git push && echo 'Pushed to GitHub'
